title: [Comb] Assertion failure in Canonicalizer with extractConcatToConcatExtract pattern

features.name: multi_bit_output_with_mixed_assignment_types
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit output signal (4+ bits) with both continuous assignments and procedural assignments targeting different bits of the same signal

features.name: combinational_extract_from_concat
features.description: Code should include extract operations on concatenated values where canonicalization patterns may be applied in rapid succession causing use-after-replacement
features.snippet:
wire [3:0] combined = {out[3], out[2], out[1], out[0]};
wire bit0 = combined[0];

features.name: implicit_sensitivity_list_always_block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with implicit sensitivity list (@*) containing multiple concurrent bit-select assignments
